entries.claim: PendingAction confirmations are server-minted, action-hash-bound, single-use, reject mismatched/expired/replayed tokens, and do not consume the token on action-hash mismatch.
entries.evidence: The confirm test filter passed 8 tests covering action-bound one-time tokens, replay rejection, token-from-another-pending rejection, expiry, action-hash mismatch without token consumption, unknown ids, and action-hash binding field mutation.

entries.claim: Confirmed destructive actions are consumed exactly once, audited with start and ok/error rows around the executor call, and replay does not execute again.
entries.evidence: The app-host confirmation tests passed, proving start audit before executor, ok/error audit after executor, replay rejection without a second executor call, executor error redaction, invalid pending with no audit/execution, and audit-start failure with no executor call.

entries.claim: The provider-visible model context and turn history contain no capability, session, confirmation, OAuth, provider, or bridge-token sentinels.
entries.evidence: A history-capture provider recorded the model-visible history; the test asserts absence of cap/session/confirmation/OAuth/provider/bridge token sentinel strings in provider history and final turn history.

entries.claim: Confirmation-required metadata is a UI-only event and is not pushed back into provider history; stream token events and audit/error summaries do not leak confirmation tokens.
entries.command: cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-agent confirmation_required_event_not_in_provider_history -- --nocapture && cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-subscription-experimental agent_stream_token_events_contain_no_confirmation_token -- --nocapture && cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-subscription-experimental agent_error_and_audit_redact_confirmation_token -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The no-leak tests passed: provider history excludes confirmation_required/pending_id/action_hash/expiry metadata; stream token events exclude the later confirmation token; executor errors and audit entries redact raw confirmation-token-bearing text.

entries.claim: AgentStreamHub emits stable typed events with done reasons, remains bounded, times out on slow consumers, and supports terminal cancellation.
entries.evidence: The stream test filter passed 9 tests proving typed token/tool/result/confirmation/error/done JSON, single-line stable serialization, bounded sync_channel use, timeout behavior for slow consumers, and cancelled terminal done events.

entries.claim: DaemonAgent runs a full FakeProvider turn over the stream hub, registers pending destructive actions without executing them, confirms exactly once, cancels with done.reason=cancelled, and sweeps unopened streams.
entries.evidence: The daemon_agent filter passed 7 tests covering token streaming, destructive pending registration without execution, pending_confirmation stream closure, confirm result/replay rejection, cancelled done, and unopened stream TTL sweep.

entries.claim: The WebUI agent API exposes /turn and /chat, requires action_hash for confirm, cap-gates agent POSTs, session-gates mobile POST/status/SSE paths, and applies the same gate to bridge streams.
entries.evidence: The webui agent filter passed 12 tests covering /chat alias behavior, confirm action_hash validation, cap-token validation, mobile session-before-cap behavior, status session/no-cap behavior, real HTTP agent SSE session gating, and Android bridge stream gating.

entries.claim: The #621 branch passed targeted host gates for tests, clippy, formatting, traceability, evidence validation, and whitespace checks.
entries.command: cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-agent turn -- --nocapture && cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-subscription-experimental agent -- --nocapture && cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-webui agent -- --nocapture && cargo +1.95.0 clippy -p isyncyou-agent --all-targets --features http,agent-subscription-experimental -- -D warnings && cargo +1.95.0 clippy -p isyncyou-app-host --all-targets --features agent-subscription-experimental -- -D warnings && cargo +1.95.0 clippy -p isyncyou-webui --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo +1.95.0 fmt --all --check && python3 tools/check_traceability.py && python3 tools/check_evidence.py --manifest docs/evidence/issue-621-manifest.json && git diff --check
entries.evidence: Task-level gates passed for Tasks 1 through 6. Task 7 validates traceability and this evidence manifest; final Task 8 reruns the required aggregate gates before any push/PR.
